name: ErinysRecruit
commands: Wait... Erinys?!{br}The hell are you doing here?{w}
Huh? Aren't you... It can't be! Prince Lewyn?!{w}{br}... What exactly are you wearing, milord?{w}
What, this? I'm a bard now. You know, walking the land, spreading songs and cheer?{w}{br}What do you say: perfect, or perfect?{w}
Er... Perfect? But why, milord...{w}{br}Aren't you supposed to be held captive at Evans?{w}{br}I got here as fast as I could, but...{w}
I'm imprisoned at Evans, am I?{br}Where'd you here that one?{w}
King Chagall of Agustria said so.{w}

Chagall? Hah! Hate to break it to you, Erinys,{br}but you've been tricked!{w}{br}It's nice and all that you're so ready to trust,{w}{br}but you wouldn't last ten seconds out there in the city!{w}{br}It'd eat you and your innocence alive.{br}You might even end up like Sylvia...{w}
Oh, Sylvia's... Er, it's not important.{w}{br}Point is, what are you doing all the way out here?{w}

Isn't it obvious?{w}{br}I'm here to find and bring you home, milord.{w}{br}It's been two years since you fled Silesse.{w}{br}Her Majesty is gravely worried about you.{w}{br}Please, milord. Come home with me.{w}

Do you have any idea what that'd do to Silesse, Erinys?{w}{br}If I go back, I'll have no choice but to take the throne.{w}{br}It's my father's last will, but my uncles would never accept it.{w}{br}Just one false step and we'd have a civil war, just like here.{w}{br}And it's always the common folk who suffer for it!{w}{br}If there are people who want to be kings or whatever, great!{w}{br}Out here, though, I'm free, and I like it that way.{w}{br}I don't want a thing to do with that throne.{w}{br}For the good of Silesse, just give it to one of my uncles.{w}

I can't allow that, milord.{w}{br}You know as well as I do that the kings of Silesse must descent from Forseti, the wind god.{w}{br}You, milord, are the sole living scion of his lineage.{w}{br}None of your uncles bear it.{br}You, milord, are Silesse's future!{w}{br}Yourself and your uncles aside, all Silesse wishes to see you claim the throne.{w}{br}And... and your mother, the queen, was in tears when she sent me...{w}{br}Please, milord... Come back.{w}

Erinys... Ugh, don't you start crying too!{w}{br}Give me a break... I can't stand to see a woman in tears...{w}{br}Okay, fine... I'll think about going home.{w}{br}Just... Give me some time to muster the nerve, alright?{w}
Thank you. In that case, I'm staying with you until you're ready, milord.{w}{br}I'll send a messenger back to Silesse to report that you're safe.{w}

Wow, you're persistent, I'll grant you that.{w}{br}All right, I think I'll stay with Sigurd's army for now.{w}{br}He's a pretty neat guy to work with, not to mention his army's full of beauties!{w}{br}Hey, Erinys, you could stand to get to know some of the ladies here.{w}{br}Maybe their stylishness could rub off on you a bit!{w}
Hey, I'm just kidding, Erinys! Relax a bit!{br}Don't take everything so seriously!{w}{br}...Heh, nobody in the world's as sweet as you.{br}Don't you ever change a thing.{w}
Y-yes, sir... I mean, no, milord...{w}
